tasks.description: Add token detail fields to database schema with migration
steps: Create migration 007_add_token_detail_fields.sql that adds 3 new columns: reasoning_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, cache_read_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, cache_write_tokens BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
Migration runs successfully against existing database
Verify all new fields default to 0 (NOT NULL) so existing minions get 0 automatically

tasks.description: Create migration rollback file for safe deployment
steps: Create 007_add_token_detail_fields_down.sql with: ALTER TABLE minions DROP COLUMN reasoning_tokens, DROP COLUMN cache_read_tokens, DROP COLUMN cache_write_tokens
Verify rollback migration syntax is valid PostgreSQL
Document rollback strategy matches existing migration patterns (005/006 have explicit up/down)

tasks.description: Update Minion struct and UpdateTokenUsageParams with new fields
steps: Minion struct in orchestrator/internal/db/minions.go includes ReasoningTokens int64, CacheReadTokens int64, CacheWriteTokens int64 fields
UpdateTokenUsageParams struct includes 6 fields total: InputTokens, OutputTokens, ReasoningTokens, CacheReadTokens, CacheWriteTokens, CostUSD

tasks.description: Update all database queries to include new token fields
steps: UpdateTokenUsage() SQL uses atomic increments for all 6 fields: SET input_tokens = input_tokens + $1, output_tokens = output_tokens + $2, reasoning_tokens = reasoning_tokens + $3, cache_read_tokens = cache_read_tokens + $4, cache_write_tokens = cache_write_tokens + $5, cost_usd = cost_usd + $6

Update all 11 SELECT queries to include new fields: FindRecentDuplicate, GetByID, List, ListByStatuses, ListPending, ListIdleRunning, ListClarificationTimeouts, ListTerminalWithPodOlderThan, GetByClarificationMessageID, and the 2 queries in GetStats
Update scanMinion() and scanMinionWithOwner() helper functions to scan all new fields in correct order

tasks.description: Update GetStats() to combine token fields in SQL aggregation
steps: Update GetStats() total query (line 1074) to: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0), COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens + reasoning_tokens + cache_write_tokens), 0)

Update GetStats() by_model query (line 1083) to: SELECT model, COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0), COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0), COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens + reasoning_tokens + cache_write_tokens), 0), COUNT(*)
Verify SQL combines token types correctly: input = input + cache_read; output = output + reasoning + cache_write

tasks.description: Update HandleGet to combine token fields before returning API response
steps: In orchestrator/internal/api/minions.go HandleGet function (line 389), update InputTokens mapping to: InputTokens: minion.InputTokens + minion.CacheReadTokens
Update OutputTokens mapping to: OutputTokens: minion.OutputTokens + minion.ReasoningTokens + minion.CacheWriteTokens
Verify GetMinionResponse struct does not need new fields (API returns combined display totals, not granular breakdown)

tasks.description: Update TokenUsage struct to include new fields
steps: TokenUsage struct in orchestrator/internal/streaming/sse.go includes: ReasoningTokens int64, CacheReadTokens int64, CacheWriteTokens int64, CostUSD float64

tasks.description: Fix extractTokenUsage() to parse OpenCode message.updated events for tokens and cost
steps: extractTokenUsage() correctly parses message.updated events with nested structure: content := event.Content["content"].(map[string]any); info := content["info"].(map[string]any)
Extract cost from info.cost using safe type assertion: if cost, ok := info["cost"].(float64); ok { usage.CostUSD = cost }
Extract tokens from info.tokens.input, .output, .reasoning using safe type assertions
Extract cache tokens from info.tokens.cache.read and .cache.write (nested map)
Handle missing or malformed fields gracefully (returns zero values, does not crash)
Create testdata/message_updated.json with sample OpenCode event structure matching real SSE format

tasks.description: Add observability logging to token extraction
steps: extractTokenUsage() logs warning when no data extracted (cost=0, all tokens=0): "Failed to extract tokens from event type=%s: all values zero"
extractTokenUsage() logs debug-level message on successful extraction: "Extracted tokens: input=%d (cache_read=%d), output=%d (reasoning=%d, cache_write=%d), cost=$%.6f"
Add warning log if cost field missing but tokens present: "Token data present but cost missing in event"

tasks.description: Update event handlers to pass new token fields
steps: DBEventHandler.HandleTokenUsage() in orchestrator/internal/streaming/handler.go passes all 6 extracted fields to UpdateTokenUsage()
NoOpEventHandler.HandleTokenUsage() logs all new fields for debugging: input, output, reasoning, cache_read, cache_write, cost

tasks.description: Update minion detail component to display formatted token counts and cost
steps: Verify control-panel/src/components/minion-detail-client.tsx displays input_tokens and output_tokens (no changes needed - backend returns combined totals)
Ensure cost displays with 5 decimal places using existing formatCost helper or add formatter: cost.toFixed(5)
Ensure token counts display with thousands separators using existing formatTokens helper or add formatter: tokens.toLocaleString()

tasks.description: Implement real-time polling for cost updates on minion detail page
steps: Minion detail component adds useEffect hook that polls GET /api/minions/:id every 3 seconds when minion.status is 'running' or 'pending'
Polling updates displayed cost and token counts in real-time without manual refresh
Polling stops automatically when minion reaches terminal status ('completed', 'failed', 'terminated')
Use clearInterval on cleanup to prevent memory leaks

tasks.description: Add integration test for token and cost extraction
steps: Create orchestrator/internal/streaming/testdata/message_updated.json with sample OpenCode SSE event matching real format: {"type": "message.updated", "content": {"content": {"info": {"cost": 0.02954525, "tokens": {"input": 1763, "output": 929, "reasoning": 793, "cache": {"read": 13440, "write": 0}}}}}}
Create integration test TestExtractTokenUsage_MessageUpdated in orchestrator/internal/streaming/sse_test.go that loads testdata and validates extraction
Test validates safe float64 conversion for cost field (0.02954525)
Test validates all token fields extracted correctly: input=1763, output=929, reasoning=793, cache_read=13440, cache_write=0
Test validates graceful handling of missing fields (partial event returns zero for missing values)
Run: cd orchestrator && go build ./... (exits with code 0)
Run: cd control-panel && npm run build (exits with code 0)
No compilation errors or type mismatches

tasks.description: Manual verification of cost tracking in UI
steps: Manual test: Create a new minion via Discord and navigate to /minions/:id detail page
Verify cost displays as non-zero (e.g., $0.02954) while minion is running
Verify input and output token counts display with thousands separators (e.g., 15,203)
Verify stats page at /stats shows non-zero total cost and tokens after minion completes
Verify cost/tokens update automatically every 3 seconds while minion is running (no manual browser refresh needed)

tasks.description: Manual verification of logging and error handling
steps: Manual test: Check orchestrator logs (kubectl logs) for debug-level token extraction success messages showing extracted values
Manual test: Verify warning log appears when extraction returns all zeros (can test by temporarily breaking event structure)
Manual test: Verify orchestrator doesn't crash when SSE event has missing cost or token fields

tasks.description: Update documentation for token tracking implementation
steps: Update AGENTS.md minion observability section to document token tracking: database stores 6 fields (input, output, reasoning, cache_read, cache_write, cost), backend combines for display, extraction from SSE content.content.info path
Add code comment block above extractTokenUsage() explaining OpenCode event structure with example JSON showing nested content.content.info.tokens and .cost paths

patterns: Atomic token updates: orchestrator/internal/db/minions.go:UpdateTokenUsage() - Uses PostgreSQL atomic increments to avoid race conditions
SSE event extraction: orchestrator/internal/streaming/sse.go:extractTokenUsage() - Type-safe extraction with nil checks
Database scanning: orchestrator/internal/db/minions.go:scanMinion() - Centralized row scanning for consistency
Stats aggregation: orchestrator/internal/db/minions.go:GetStats() - Server-side SUM() queries combine token types
API response mapping: orchestrator/internal/api/minions.go:HandleGet() - Combines granular DB fields into display totals
Near-realtime updates: Control panel minion detail page polls API every 3 seconds for running minions
Token extraction observability: Debug logging on success, warning logging on failure
nonGoals: Cost budgets/limits - Auto-stop minions when costs exceed threshold
Multi-currency support - Display costs in EUR/GBP/etc
Cost optimization suggestions - Use prompt caching to reduce cost by X%
Cost attribution/tagging - Tag minions by project/team for chargeback
Export to billing systems - Push costs to external accounting tools
Historical cost trends - Charts showing cost over time
Per-event cost tracking - Store cost for each individual SSE event
Expose granular token fields in API - Only return combined display totals (input+cache_read, output+reasoning+cache_write)
Stats page real-time polling - Only minion detail page polls; stats page shows historical totals
